title: Sleazy and Cheezy!
description: Watch Sleazy and Cheezy take each other down in more and more creative ways. Kids and really immature adults will laugh until they get double vision!
altHero: Sleazy, a cat, and Cheezy, a mouse in a kitchen; Cheezy is holding a frying pan
alt1: Sleazy holding a fork that is holding a lit firework that looks like Cheezy
alt2: Cheezy looking up in the smoke of Sleazy’s explosion
alt3: a burned up Sleazy has his claws out
